facebook.content:
As followers of Christ, we often view spiritual warfare as an external battle against dark forces. But the truth is, our greatest enemy is not outside, but inside our own minds. 

The Apostle Paul warns us, "For though we live in the body, we do not wage war in an unspiritual way, for the weapons of our warfare are not worldly" (2 Corinthians 10:3-4). 

So, what is the real battleground? Our thoughts. What we think about, we give power to.

The Apostle Paul warns us, "For though we live in the body, we do not wage war in an unspiritual way, for the weapons of our warfare are not worldly" (2 Corinthians 10:3-4). 

So, what is the real battleground? Our thoughts. What we think about, we give power to.

instagram.content: "Your identity is not defined by your struggles, but by your response to them. Just as Jesus didn't define Himself by the temptations in the wilderness, but by His unyielding resolve, so too must you stand unwavering in the face of adversity.
